title: Fresh Filipino Chicken Soup
description: A comforting, dairy‑free chicken soup featuring tender chicken, fresh papaya, carrots, and malunggay leaves, perfect for kids and adults alike.
instructions: Heat a large pot over medium heat and add a splash of oil.
Sauté the minced garlic, sliced onion, and galangal/ginger until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Add the sliced chicken breast and cook until it turns white on the outside, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the water, cover, and bring to a gentle boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the diced green papaya, carrots, and fish sauce. Continue simmering for another 8 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the malunggay leaves and simmer for 2 more minutes until wilted.
Slowly pour in the eggs, stirring gently to form soft ribbons. Cook for 1 minute until the eggs are set.
Taste and season with salt as needed.
Serve hot, ladling soup into bowls with a few garnish stalks of scallion if desired.
